meaning: n.[微生]微生物,微小动植物
examples: Halophilic Microorganism is widely distributed in globe, among which Psychropliles and Psychrotrophs have been much more studied.
Based on the experiment of biofilm A/O process, the feasibility of brief-nitrification in attached microorganism system is studied.
What Diversa did was steal one microorganism's method of performing this at high temperatures.
Life on Mars could have taken the form of a microorganism that used the minerals as an energy source.
Their discovery was a painstaking process: She had to purify samples down to a single microorganism, a step that took eight months.
